chapter_title.ar: باب التَّشَهُّدِ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ الْأَوَّلَتَيْنِ وَ الرَّابِعَةِ وَ التَّسْلِيمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 –The performing of the Tashahhud (testimonies) during the first two Rak’at, and the fourth, and the greeting (Salām)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/163)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/163)
text: إِذَا انْصَرَفْتَ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ فَانْصَرِفْ عَنْ يَمِينِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘When you exit from the Salāt, so exit from your right’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you want to move away after completing Salah (prayer) move to your right side.”’
